errors: A tile loading in kernel only loads diagonal elements (As[ti][ti]), leading to incorrect computation of A @ (B.T @ X). The kernel will produce wrong results.
suggested_fixes: Fix A tile loading: each thread should load one element of A for its row and all ranks, e.g., using a loop over ranks with threadIdx.y or collaborative loading to fill the entire As[16][16] tile.
warnings: Y tensor from matmul may not be contiguous; consider calling .contiguous() before passing to kernel to ensure correct data pointer.
No device synchronization after kernel launch; if Y is used on CPU immediately, results may be incomplete.
